query:
-- 修复 exchangeSchools 表字段
ALTER TABLE exchangeSchools 
  CHANGE COLUMN city region VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  CHANGE COLUMN contactName contactPerson VARCHAR(100) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN receptionProcess TEXT NULL AFTER contactEmail,
  ADD COLUMN availableDates JSON NULL AFTER receptionProcess,
  ADD COLUMN schoolType VARCHAR(50) NULL AFTER availableDates,
  ADD COLUMN maxGroupSize INT NULL DEFAULT 50 AFTER schoolType,
  ADD COLUMN capacity INT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER maxGroupSize,
  ADD COLUMN isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE AFTER capacity,
  ADD COLUMN createdBy INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 AFTER isActive;
